description: Temporary security debt accepted so the guardrail can block new regressions while existing Tauri filesystem permissions are narrowed incrementally.

acceptedFindings.reason: Legacy Tauri file bridge still relies on the broad fs plugin default. Replace with explicit fs permissions and backend-validated vault writes.
Legacy vault selection can currently target user home files. Replace with user-selected vault roots mediated by Rust validation.
Legacy vault selection can currently target Documents. Replace with scoped vault grants.
Legacy vault selection can currently target Downloads. Replace with scoped vault grants.
Legacy vault selection can currently target Desktop. Replace with scoped vault grants.
Temporary local LLM/runtime bridge debt. Replace wildcard localhost CSP with exact runtime ports before hardening production builds.
Temporary local LLM/runtime bridge debt. Replace wildcard localhost CSP with exact runtime ports before hardening production builds.
Legacy renderer bridge still expects the global Tauri API. Migrate callers to explicit @tauri-apps/api imports before disabling it.
